summary: Eval cases controller: CRUD for test cases, A/B run execution via agent-tool-bridge, session replay, tool call metrics
Agent eval report: per-agent tool chat rate, send-public/private confusion matrix, tool success rate and latency percentiles
Skill registry: CRUD for skills (SKILL.md + openai.yaml), listSkills/resolveSkills/getSkill, external skill dirs
Agent prompt builder: skill injection (formatSkillDescriptors/formatSkillDocuments), expectations tagging, tool bridge env injection
Agent tool bridge: invocation context, dryRun mode, tool call event recording, public/private post interception
Agent eval metrics doc: expectations policy, tool call events, confusion matrix, eval report script usage

Phase 1 backend/controller/test chain landed: generate now auto smoke-validates, validity_status unified to pending/validated/invalid, run-all reruns validated+invalid, and minimal E2E covers generate→auto-validate via injected startRun/evaluateRun.

Skill Tests UX polish landed in eval-cases: selected-skill overview, friendlier Chinese labels, search/status filters, clearer empty/detail states, persisted skill selection, configurable generate/manual create options, and summary refresh after create/run/delete/generate actions.

Phase 2 regression slice landed: skill-test runs now persist promptVersion on eval_case_runs, case/skill regression summary endpoints group by provider:model:promptVersion, and Skill Tests detail UI renders per-case regression comparison plus prompt-version run controls.

Phase 2 L3 sequence validation landed: structured expectedTools now accept order/sequence metadata, execution evaluation emits sequenceCheck and gates executionPassed on ordered matches, the Skill Tests UI surfaces ordered-tool diagnostics, and E2E covers both ordered pass/fail cases.

Phase 2 full-mode AI judge landed: full-mode trigger evaluation now records behavior-signal matches plus AI judge verdict/confidence/reason, executeRun awaits async evaluation, Skill Tests detail UI surfaces trigger judge diagnostics, and E2E covers the fallback path where only AI judge can pass trigger.

Phase 2 generator extraction landed: skill-test generator now derives structured expectedTools from fenced snippets, inline commands, and plain-text workflow lines, normalizes placeholder-heavy paths into <contains:...> checks, and regression coverage now includes generator extraction plus contains-based execution matching.
